context: Tests whether the agent keeps Core Animation bridge guidance source-grounded and avoids obsolete SwiftUI timing claims.

checklist.name: SwiftUI cubic timing
checklist.description: States that SwiftUI can express cubic Bezier timing with `UnitCurve.bezier` and `Animation.timingCurve(_:duration:)` for view animations.

checklist.name: Appropriate CA boundary
checklist.description: Reserves Core Animation for CALayer-specific properties, additive animations, path animations, display-link drawing, or direct layer manipulation.

checklist.name: Frame-rate hints
checklist.description: Explains that ProMotion frame-rate requests are hints, not guarantees, and the app must adapt to system-selected refresh rates.

checklist.name: Coordinator delegate
checklist.description: Uses the `UIViewRepresentable` Coordinator as the `CAAnimationDelegate` and does not use `uiView.next` as the delegate.

checklist.name: Display link lifecycle
checklist.description: Includes lifecycle guidance such as invalidating `CADisplayLink` when not needed and avoiding unnecessary display links.
